title: First Dragon [Yuan Long] Season 3 Episode 9 Subtitle
description:
First Dragon [Yuan Long] Season 3, Carp Reborn 3rd Season Subtitle indonesia, english, portuguese, turkish, spanish, italian, polish, arabic, thai, german

Wang Sheng woke up in the modern world, everything is so real and dreamlike. The appearance of the princess of the imperial city and the young master of the Dai Family, made the situation even more confusing. A big bet, also made Wang Sheng gradually realize that this is not just a competition between him and the young master of the Dai Family. Just in time for the party, people gathered, and Wang Sheng had to stand in front of the stage again. Although Wang Sheng knew that the battle with guns in the field was far away not comparable to the turbulent hidden current, he didn't know that the world was secretly becoming a bargaining chip in another bet... Like suddenly waking up from a dream, it turns out that the key to breaking the game is hidden in the dream. At the same time, the roulette wheel engraved with the nine-character spell is also turning silently...

Wang Sheng terbangun di dunia modern, semuanya begitu nyata dan seperti mimpi. Munculnya putri dari kota kekaisaran dan tuan muda dari Keluarga Dai, membuat situasi semakin membingungkan. Sebuah taruhan besar, juga membuat Wang Sheng secara bertahap menyadari bahwa ini bukan hanya persaingan antara dia dan tuan muda Keluarga Dai. Tepat pada waktunya untuk pesta, orang-orang berkumpul, dan Wang Sheng harus berdiri di depan panggung lagi. Meskipun Wang Sheng tahu bahwa pertempuran dengan senjata di lapangan jauh tidak sebanding dengan arus tersembunyi yang bergejolak, dia tidak tahu bahwa dunia sedang diam-diam menjadi alat tawar-menawar dalam taruhan yang lain... Seperti tiba-tiba terbangun dari mimpi, ternyata kunci untuk memecahkan permainannya tersembunyi di dalam mimpi. Pada saat yang sama, roda rolet yang diukir dengan mantra sembilan karakter juga sedang berputar diam-diam...
